name: Joshua's Conquest of Canaan
description: After 40 years in the wilderness, Joshua led Israel across the Jordan River and conquered the Promised Land in a series of brilliant campaigns that destroyed 31 Canaanite kings.

name: The Judges of Israel
description: For over 300 years after the Conquest, Israel repeatedly fell into sin, was oppressed by enemies, and was delivered by God-appointed judges who led them in battle.

name: David's Wars of Unification
description: David rose from shepherd boy to warrior king, unifying all twelve tribes and establishing Jerusalem as the capital through a series of decisive military victories.

name: Alexander the Great's Conquests
description: In just 13 years, Alexander conquered the known world from Greece to India, creating the largest empire the ancient world had ever seen.

name: The Punic Wars
description: Three wars between Rome and Carthage that shaped the Mediterranean world and saw Hannibal's legendary crossing of the Alps.

name: Caesar's Gallic Wars
description: Caesar's conquest of Gaul from 58-50 BCE brought millions under Roman rule and made Caesar the most powerful man in Rome.

name: The Crusades
description: Two centuries of religious warfare between Christendom and Islam for control of the Holy Land.

name: Mongol Conquests
description: The Mongol Empire conquered more territory in 25 years than the Romans did in 400, creating the largest contiguous empire in history.

name: Napoleonic Wars
description: Napoleon's campaigns reshaped Europe through a series of wars involving virtually every major power on the continent.

name: American Civil War
description: The bloodiest conflict in American history, fought over slavery and states' rights, with over 620,000 dead.

name: World War I: Western Front
description: Four years of trench warfare across France and Belgium that defined a generation and killed millions.

name: World War II: European Theater
description: The largest and deadliest conflict in human history, from the invasion of Poland to the fall of Berlin.

name: World War II: Pacific Theater
description: From Pearl Harbor to Hiroshima — the Pacific war between the Allies and Imperial Japan.
